feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get the log status when running Application Jobs via API
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

I am currently testing running jobs via API on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
I can run the jobs successfully, but I don't know how to get the results.

I tried several APIs that are supposed to return results, but the return value does not change whether the job log status is success or error.
Is there any way to get information related to the job log?

Ideally, I would like to obtain the Log Status that is displayed as shown below.

The APIs I tried are as follows:

Schedule an Application Job
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/719bbb943fc84cd884fa889d04b1d1b9.html?locale=en-US
⇒Although JobStatus and ReturnCode appear to indicate the result, the values ​​do not change depending on the log status.

Read Application Job Status
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/66cfe7da5a28422b9d05adc42ed07056.html?locale=en-US
⇒Although JobStatus and ReturnCode appear to indicate the result, the values ​​do not change depending on the log status.

Read Detailed Job and Step Information
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/01ff6d4fa9c84f3788e5c0574cd74a5f.html?locale=en-US
⇒It appears that JobStatus, JobAppRC, StepStatus and StepAppRC are related to the result, but the values ​​do not change depending on the log status.

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Planned Downtime - Announcement - 22 November 2024
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Planned Downtime - Announcement - 22 November 2024

The downtime is being planned on a weekday which will affect our operations. Would it be possible to reschedule the same for a weekend.

entry.title: Get Header Note field from Purchase Order
entry.content:
I would like to get value of Header Note field from PO and show in PO template.

Is there any BAdI implementation of PO which can get Header Note field.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Software Collections in S4HC and so called dependencies
entry.content:
In our 2-Tier S4HC Public Cloud we want to move some objects from our DEV landscape to PROD and that is done via a Software Collection.

I have a need to move some objects a month or more BEFORE the other objects.  Hence I need 2 separate collections.   So called dependencies prevent it - why does this happen and can it be overcome?.

Moving an object from one to another Software collection does detect dependencies however other non-related objects also are 'detected' incorrectly.  For example I had 1 Brand new CDS API View and an associated Custom Comms Scenario – on attempting to move that object, it detected 30+ other non-related objects that I did not want moved.

So trying to move this

 

But am prevented as it also wants to drag in all these unrelated objects.

entry.title: Need a custom importing parameter (Plant) for implementing OCI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to seek an advice on how we can have a custom importing parameter that will contain the value for the Plant. We already develop a logic in the BADI MMPUR_OCI_ITEM_TRANSFER_DATA to get the SAP Material Number using the VENDORMAT importing parameter from the external catalog which is a same value for Supplier Material Number in the S4 system using the CDS of Purchasing Info Records. The problem is multiple plants may use a common VENDORMAT or Supplier Material Number but maintaining different SAP Material Number and PIR. And in order to get the correct SAP Material Number from the runtime internal table we need a second importing parameter that is also an identifier which in this case is Plant.

Is there any way that we can make a custom importing parameter that is coming from the code and not on the parameter sent by the external catalog?

We thought of assigning specific web services per plant to make the logic possible.

It is a very helpful feature if will become successful because, it will prevent users on purchasing materials without checking on the stocks.

Hope you can help with this.

Thanks.

entry.title: Custom RAP Application Deployment to SAP S/4 HANA Public Edition Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I have created a custom rap application in ADT and exposed it to OData V4 and from Business Application studio I have deployed the application to Development Tenant.

Then I created IAM App and Business Catalog and assigned IAM App to business catalog.

Later I created a Custom Business Role and assigned the catalog which I created in ADT by assigning IAM application to it and assigned to Business Users and also in Business Catalogs tile I can see my catalog

But I am unable to see the Custom RAP Application in System..

Kindly Help to achieve.

Thanks in Advance. 

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Can we integrate external API of Cleartax for EInvoicing and EWay Bill in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Sap Experts!

In SAP S/4 Hana Public cloud, for Integrating E-Invoicing and E-Way Bill can we call external API Directly without having any middleware (CPI)?

Help me in how we can integrate E-Invoice and E-Way Bill in SAP Public cloud?

Thanks in advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to call SAP ByDesign API from S4HANA Cloud System
entry.content:
I would like to call Sales Order API(ByD) from S4hana Sales Order BAdI logic.

Target is that when I save SO in S4 system, SO data from S4 will pass to ByD via API.

Is that possible to do? Is there any reference for this requirement?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?

This is the red line in the image.

If it cannot be done without UI Adaptation support, how do I search for apps that UI Adaptation supports?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Issue with API Authorization in S/4HANA Cloud Public for Fiori App on BTP
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working on extending a S/4HANA Cloud Public system by developing a Fiori application on SAP BTP. I want to avoid using a communication user for API access, so I activated the SAML Bearer Assertion option in my communication arrangement.

I successfully connected, but I encountered an authorization issue when accessing the API. Here's the error I received:

{"error":{"code":"/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS/011","message":"No authorization to access service group 'API_CONDITION_CONTRACT'","@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory":"Authorization_Error","innererror":{"ErrorDetails":{"@SAP__common.Application":{"ComponentId":"LO-AB","ServiceRepository":"SRVD_A2X","ServiceId":"API_CONDITION_CONTRACT","ServiceVersion":"0001"},"@SAP__common.TransactionId":"EC8D33BA4BA401A0E00673AAE05232B9","@SAP__common.Timestamp":"20241118080847.08386","@SAP__common.ErrorResolution":{"Analysis":"Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details","Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"}}}}}



To resolve this, I created an IAM app to assign the required services to my user. However, as far as I understand, IAM apps only work for custom services (Z*), while I need to access a standard service. When I use CTRL+Space to add OData v4 service in my IAM app, nothing is found.

I also tried adding authorization objects (e.g., s_start) in the IAM app, but I received an error saying it’s not allowed.

Additionally, I couldn’t find any business role that explicitly grants access to this API. For other APIs, such business roles are sometimes available and indicated in API documentation, but I couldn’t locate it in this case.

My goal is to ensure the API access is tied to a named user for proper traceability and authorization management.

What is the recommended way to configure this to allow access to standard APIs for a named user in S/4HANA Cloud Public?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,
Severin

entry.title: How to deploy full stack cloud application(CAP + SAPUI5) to BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Can someone help to deploy Full Stack Cloud Application to Cloud Foundry which is developed in BAS using CAP and SAPUI5?.  I am not using SAP Hana Cloud or any kind of  database. Its getting data from S/4 Hana Public Cloud system with destination.

I tried to deploy, it got deployed successfully but when i access app using provided URL, i am getting one error in logs as "msg":"x-forwarded-path header: undefined"} and "msg":"query does not exist for request url /"}. Please help me if someone came across this kind of situation.

I appreciate your response in advance.

Regards,

Omkar B.

entry.title: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?

This is the red line in the image.

If it cannot be done without UI Adaptation support, how do I search for apps that UI Adaptation supports?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Question regarding Data Source Integration in Content Form Templates
entry.content:
Is it possible to include data from 'View Browser' and custom CDS Views as data sources in Content Form Templates for displaying on forms/documents?
(It's acceptable to follow the flow: Table Data → Custom Logic → Form Data Source)
If possible, please explain the scope of what can be developed.

I will describe the specific requirements and questions below. 

Requirements:

  • Need to detect and print "Reprinted" on documents when they are reprinted
  • Need to detect and print modified areas on documents when they are changed

 

Question: "In the on-premise SAP system, it's possible to:

  1. Print 'Reprinted' on documents using records from NAST (Output Management Table)
  2. Print modified areas on documents using records from CDHDR (Change Document Header Table)

 

How can we utilize these records for document printing in the SAP Public Cloud version?"

Thank you.

entry.title: Issue in Connecting SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition system to Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I am trying to connect our S/4 Hana private edition (Cloud System) to Eclipse, and in eclipse i added ABAP Cloud project and tried connecting with the Fiori URL and I am getting error "Logon to the ABAP service instance has failed". Attaching Screenshot for your reference.

Kindly help.

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Regarding the Schedule End Time in Schedule Delivery Creation
entry.content:
Application: Schedule Delivery Creation
Component: LE-SHP-GF-JS

Requirement: In the Schedule Delivery Creation app, I want to define the job end time
Question: In the Schedule Delivery Creation app, while we can specify the job start time, is it possible to schedule a job with a time range, such as AM09:00~AM11:00?

Note: On the screen, I could only find the parameter for start time.

I am attaching a screenshot of the start time parameter section below.

Thank you.

entry.title: OData authorization Error in Pulic Cloud
entry.content:
I'm using the API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV service to create a Fiori report. However, when I deploy the app from BAS to the Cloud environment and log in with a Business User, I encounter an error during queries: "You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV 0001, return code 4." Where can this authorization be configured? The full URL is:
https://my000000.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrderItem_2

entry.title: Query Regarding Excluding Measure Data (<= 600) in Custom Analytical Querie
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I am working on a Custom Analytical Query(yy1_Report)  in SAP S/4HANA Cloud using the Custom Analytical Queries app. My goal is to exclude rows where the measure Amount in Company Code Currency is less than or equal to 600 (<= 600).

However, I have observed that:

  1. Filters are not directly applicable to measures in the query designer.
  2. I need to find a way to either exclude these rows from the query result or create a restricted view that meets this condition.

I want to exclude all rows where Amount in Company Code Currency <= 600 and display only rows with values greater than 600.

Example Data:

GL Account Document Number Posting Date Amount in Company Code Currency

100000123452024-01-01500
200000123462024-01-02700

Desired Output:

GL Account Document Number Posting Date Amount in Company Code Currency

200000123462024-01-02700

Could you please suggest, since it is very urgent.

Note: we want to filter on the consolidated amount hence we cant do it in CDS view level we need to perform this in query level.

Thanks and Regards

Ruchi Kesharwani

entry.title: Processing of SAP and Document Management System Integration
entry.content:
Hi ALL,

In the business process processing of SAP, users will upload relevant business documents, such as product drawings, sales contracts, etc. As SAP is a cloud system, the corresponding cloud storage space is limited. Users wish to upload attachments of business documents to the document management system for archiving and permission control.

I tried to add a custom field in each business document, and the type of this field is Web Address. I plan to ask users to enter the attachment address of the document management system in this field, and then users can click on the address link of this field in SAP documents to jump to the corresponding document management system address.

Do you have any corresponding application cases to share?

entry.title: CDS views that can be used to Distinguish fields changed using Sales order change log
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently trying to find a Released CDS view to distinguish between fields that are changed in the sales order once its created in Public cloud to perform some check on them in cloud BADI's.

Currently i had identified few views (i.e I_SlsDocChangeDocumentItem and C_SlsDocChangeDocumentItem)  but they are not released and i am not able to use them, could you pleas help if any of you know any CDS views that can satisfy this requirement or if there is any other alternative to distinguish the fields from change log of the sales order that can be used as conditions to perform some changes in cloud BADI.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility 

ABAP Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Make fields editable based on Login user.
entry.content:
Hello expert, 

Is there a way that we can make the custom fields editable for some login users and non-editable for some login users. I want to control the field properties based on the login users in S4 Hana cloud. 

#S4Hana,#Editable,#LoginUsers
